headline: Trump 🍊💥 Vows to Nuke Iran's Gas Daddy 🍑💨 if Qatar Gets Zapped Again
text:
ORANGE MAN 🍊👨‍💼 BADASS MODE ACTIVATED 🚀💣 – threatens to BLOW UP 🤯🔥 the ENTIRETY of Iran's THICC South Pars Gas Field 🛢️🍑 if mullahs DARE poke Qatar's Ras Laffan LNG ORGY 💦🏭 again! Israel 💙🪖 already SLAPPED 😤💥 that Persian gas bae on Feb 28, sparking CHAOS 🔥🌍 – Tehran SIMPS 😩 retaliated by YEETING missiles at Qatar's WORLD'S BIGGEST LNG PROCESSOR 🤑⛽, causing EXTENSIVE DAMAGE 💥🧨 but ZERO boo-boos 🙌 (QatarEnergy spilling tea ☕: 'All peeps safe, fires OUT 🔥🚫'). Gas prices in Europe SPIKED 25%+ 📈😱 to DOUBLE pre-war highs – UK/EU cucks SWEATING 😰💦 over $110/bbl oil 🚀🛢️, wallets CRYING 💸😭!

Trump's Truth Social RANT 📱🔥: 'Qatar INNOCENT AF 😇, Iran UNJUSTLY SALTY 🧂😡 over our ally Israel's 'violent lash-out' 😤 – WE KNEW NUTHIN' 🤷‍♂️!' Pledges MASSIVE BOOM 💣🍆 on South Pars (shared w/ Qatar's North Field 👯‍♂️) at POWER Iran NEVER SEEN 👻 – 'Don't wanna turn Persia to GLASS 🏜️💥 cuz long-term Ls, but TOUCH QATAR AGAIN & I'M HITTING THAT BUTTON 🖱️💀!' WSJ snitches 📰: Trump BACKED the strike to OWN Iran's Strait of Hormuz TANKER BLOCKADE 🚫⛴️, but NO encores 🎤🚫.

Iran Prez Masoud Pezeshkian 😡🧔 WARNING 'CONSEQUENCES BEYOND CONTROL 🌍🤯 that'll SWALLOW THE WORLD 🐟💥!' Smoke pics VERIFIED 📸💨 from TWO IMPACTS 🔥🌫️. Qatar RAGING 🍑😤 calls it 'BRAZEN' attack on NATIONAL SECURITY 🛡️, reserves RIGHT TO CLAP BACK 👊 – booted TWO Iranian DIPLOMATS & STAFF in 24hrs 🚪👢! UAE/Saudi/Oman SIMPING Qatar too 🤝🇦🇪🇴🇲, while Hezbollah 🕌💣 gets BODIED by Israel in Lebanon (1M+ DISPLACED 😢🏃‍♂️).

Energy markets in MELTDOWN MODE 📉🔥 – gas BRRRR'd 25% UP in Europe/UK before dipping 😮‍💨, but STILL DOUBLE the chill vibes pre-escalation 🤑📈! Trump + Bibi 👨‍💼💙 holding the GULF LINE 🛡️🇶🇦 against Ayatollah's GAS WAR 🛢️⚔️ – Strait of Hormuz TRAFFIC JAMMED 🚫🛳️, oil DADDIES pumping PRICES like crypto bros 💦🚀! Qatar 'reserves right to respond' 😈 – WW3 GAS ORGY incoming? 👀💥🌍 or just more Trump SAVAGE THREATS owning the Mullahs like Epstein files drop 🍊📜💣‼️
